subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Dhibh
subcodes.first_line: God hath proclaimed from the throne of grandeur and splendor, "I, verily, am the Lord God, and there is no other god beside Me
subcodes.first_line_orig: اقر لله علی عرش العظمه و الجلال بانی انا الله لا اله الا انا المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @independent investigation of truth; reality
